title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description:
We are seeking an experienced Senior Frontend Engineer to lead the development of our web applications. As a senior engineer, you will play a crucial role in architecting and implementing scalable, maintainable, and efficient frontend solutions.

Responsibilities:
- Lead the development of complex web applications using JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3
- Collaborate with designers to translate designs into functional and visually appealing user interfaces
- Optimize application performance, ensuring seamless user experiences
- Mentor junior engineers and provide technical guidance
- Participate in code reviews and ensure adherence to coding standards
- Work closely with the QA team to identify and resolve issues

Must-have skills:
- JavaScript
- HTML5
- CSS3
- Webpack
- D3.js
- Selenium
- Chrome DevTools
- Figma

Nice to have:
- Experience with testing frameworks like Jest or Mocha
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines
- Knowledge of Agile development methodologies
